title: Battle of the Ywllandr system
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Battle |prev=[[Mission to Utapau (Clone Intelligence)|Mission to Utapau]][[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'' novelization]] |conc=*[[Battle of Mygeeto]]''[[Star Wars Character Encyclopedia]]'' *[[Siege of Saleucami/Legends|Siege of Saleucami]]{{Film|III}} *[[Battle of Felucia (Outer Rim Sieges)/Legends|Battle of Felucia]]''[[Reversal of Fortune]]'' *[[Battle of Kashyyyk/Legends|Battle of Kashyyyk]] |next=[[Battle of Utapau/Legends|Battle of Utapau]] |image=[[File:BattleAtYwllandr-TEA.jpg]] |name=Battle of the Ywllandr system |conflict=[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] ([[Mygeeto theater]] of the [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]])''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |date=[[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] |place=[[Ywllandr system/Legends|Ywllandr system]] |result=[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] victory |side1=Galactic Republic |side2=[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=[[Jedi General/Legends|General]] [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]] |commanders2= |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*1 [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] *A small [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]]{{CSWECite|III|363|Ywllandr system}} **[[Courageous (Republic flagship)|''Courageous'']] |forces2= |forces3= |forces4= |casual1= |casual2= |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|Why not? Do you fear you would lose such a contest?|Plo Koon, addressing Jedi Master [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] during a High Council session, while overseeing the assault in the Ywllandr system|}} A '''battle''' occurred in the [[Ywllandr system/Legends|Ywllandr system]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], during the final [[Standard day/Legends|days]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], as part of the [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]]. Following the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]], [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]]—overseeing a small [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] [[Courageous (Republic flagship)|''Courageous'']]—pursued [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederate]] forces to the Ywllandr [[Star system/Legends|system]], which had been established as a choke point along the [[Entralla Route/Legends|Entralla Route]] to hinder Republic activity in the surrounding parts of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The ensuing [[Space warfare/Legends|engagement]] resulted in heavy fighting, with Koon eventually triumphing over the Confederate forces. His victory allowed [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi's]] [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] detachment to move in and [[Battle of Mygeeto|assault]] the nearby [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Mygeeto/Legends|Mygeeto]], while Koon was reassigned to command a [[Battle of Cato Neimoidia/Legends|campaign]] at [[Cato Neimoidia/Legends|Cato Neimoidia]]. ==Prelude== By [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], the final [[Standard year/Legends|year]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] took control of the [[Ywllandr system/Legends|Ywllandr system]] in the region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] known as the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]]. In taking the [[Star system/Legends|star system]], which laid on the [[Entralla Route/Legends|Entralla Route]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]], the Confederacy converted it into a choke point, forcing [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Starship/Legends|starships]] and [[Navy/Legends|naval]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleets]] that were bound for other areas of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] to pass through the enemy-controlled system. The system became an area of interest when the Republic targeted Separatist holdings throughout the Outer Rim in a campaign termed the [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]].''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' Following the [[Confederate Navy/Legends|Confederate Navy's]] retreat at the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]], [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]], a member of the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]], led a [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] strike force in pursuit of the Separatists. His task force chased them from the [[Galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and along the Entralla Route to the Ywllandr system, where they began an offensive to repel the Separatists from the system.{{CSWECite|I|149|''Courageous'' (2)}} ==The battle== [[File:PloKoonAndWolffe-RM.png|thumb|left|250px|General Plo Koon oversaw the Republic's assault in the Ywllandr system.]] Commanding his small fleet from the [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|bridge]] of the Republic [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] [[Courageous (Republic flagship)|''Courageous'']], Koon oversaw the Republic's [[Space warfare/Legends|assault]] on the Confederate forces, focusing on breaking the Ywllandr system's choke point. During the heavy fighting that followed, Koon participated in a meeting with the other [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] of the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] via [[holograph]]ic connection from ''Courageous''{{'s}} bridge, regarding their plan to have [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]] on [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. His fleet eventually overpowered the Separatist defenses, severing their hold on the system. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|Execute Order 66.''"
"''It will be done, my lord.|On the orders of Chancellor Palpatine, Captain Jag prepares to execute Plo Koon over Cato Neimoidia|}} [[File:Plokoonjsf.png|thumb|right|250px|Captain Jag prepares to execute Koon over Cato Neimoidia as part of Order 66.]] Koon's victory in the Ywllandr system allowed [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi's]] [[Battle group/Legends|battle group]] to reach the nearby [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Mygeeto/Legends|Mygeeto]], which—being a major holding of the Separatist-allied [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan]]—was another target in the Republic's Outer Rim campaign.{{DB|location|mygeeto|Mygeeto}} The world had been mired in [[Battle of Mygeeto|conflict]] since [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], two years prior.''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]'' While Mundi staged an assault on Mygeeto with his [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] from the [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]] and the [[Galactic Marines/Legends|Galactic Marines]],''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]'' Koon meanwhile assumed command of Republic forces on the [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] [[Purse world/Legends|purse world]] of [[Cato Neimoidia/Legends|Cato Neimoidia]], a [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] stronghold that was [[Battle of Cato Neimoidia/Legends|resisting]] Republic control{{DB|location|catoneimoidia|Cato Neimoidia}} despite its [[Siege of Cato Neimoidia|defeat]] a [[Standard month/Legends|month]] earlier.''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]'' Koon was later [[Death/Legends|killed]] following [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] issuance of [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], a secret [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|directive]] for [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] to execute their Jedi [[Commander/Legends|commanders]]. [[Clone Captain/Legends|Clone Captain]] [[Jai'galaar (clone)|Jag]] [[Starfighter combat/Legends|shot down]] the Jedi Master's [[Plo Koon's Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Delta-7 starfighter]] during an aerial patrol of one of Cato Neimoidia's [[Bridge city/Legends|bridge cities]]. ==Behind the scenes== {{Quote|In the New Territories, Plo Koon broke the Separatist defenses at Ywllandr, clearing the way for Ki-Adi-Mundi's forces to assault the key InterGalactic Banking Clan world of Mygeeto.|Excerpt from ''The Essential Guide to Warfare''{{'s}} section on the Outer Rim Sieges|}} The battle of the Ywllandr system was created for the [[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (novelization)|novelization]] of [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']], which was authored by [[Matthew Stover]] and published on [[April 2]], [[2005]]. It was referred to in passing in the novel, not being alluded to in the film itself, which was released on [[May 19]] of the same year. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (novelization)|''Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith'' novelization]] {{Ab|Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm}} {{Imo}} ==Sources== *{{CSWECite|multiple}} *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{OuterRimSiegesNav}} {{Interlang |de=Schlacht von Ywllandr |es=Batalla del sistema Ywllandr |hu=Ywllandr rendszeri csata |deGA=1 }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Ywllandr system, battle of the}} [[Category:Battles in the Prefsbelt sector]] [[Category:Battles of the Mygeeto theater]]
